code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1 = io.read_line()
let line2 = io.read_line()

match line1
when Some(l1)
  match line2
  when Some(l2)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(l1)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < parts.len()
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(p)
        match string.parse_int(p)
        when Some(n)
          nums = list.push(nums, n)
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(l2))
    when Some(target)
      match list.index_of(nums, target)
      when Some(idx)
        println("index=#{idx}")
      when None
        println("not_found")
      end
    when None
      println("not_found")
    end
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
when None
  println("not_found")
end
